name: Sylus
description:
“So, you’re the one that the twins have been gushing over all week.” | In which Sylus meets the twins’ teacher.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Sylus doesn’t necessarily regret taking in twin boys, but he also acknowledges his own ridiculous behaviour too. When Luke and Kieran stumbled into him, barely able to stand and delirious from hunger, his first response had been pity. And then an offer of a home, of fresh clothes and a warm bath. It’s how he ended up with a small family of his own, despite being a forty-something year old who deals primarily with weapons smuggling. It isn’t ideal, but he tries to give them a normal life… and then, he meets MC, their teacher.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

hiii everyone! ive had this bot saved for a while but haven’t published it. ive been primarily making bots for myself and not publishing them because I frankly … don’t think these have been good enough quality to publish? i have a stardew caleb bot and then a few others that might come out soon, but im not sure!

anyway, this is just me stating I haven’t died yet! happy new years to everyone and i hope you’re all safe & healthy in the new year! good luck pulling the new banner cards and may your ten pulls always have the card you want!

side note: because of recent events in the lads fandom, i feel the need to reiterate this; this account is a safe space for everybody, whether they are a “pro” or an “anti”. fiction ≠ reality and i have always been a hard believer of that. fiction is a place to safely explore topics that would otherwise be frowned upon, illogical or immorally wrong irl. it is not a reflection of the author nor the reader to engage with problematic ideals within fiction because how you engage with fiction does not reflect on your person in reality. the entire appeal of tropes such as pseudocest (or incest in general) with caleb particularly is that it is fiction. it is fake. these are pixels and words on a screen. engaging with these tropes does not mean someone actually condones either of them irl - the appeal is that they’re fake!! that’s the point! do all sylus mains want to date weapons smugglers and a mafia owner? do zayne mains want to date a serial killer? i really do not believe that is the case. same thing with caleb mains; it doesn’t mean they have any interest in actual psuedocest or incest in general. it means they’re drawn to a fictional trope. if you struggle to understand that, please do me a favour and unfollow me. i do not condone harassment towards anyone no matter what they believe, and i will not stand for people being targeted, called freaks or perverts or whatever because you cannot separate fiction from reality in your mind.

anyway… happy new year from me and my big brother (my Gege!!!!) caleb :]
